summary: Code review verification of Contraction Timer icons and Doula/Midwife navigation fixes. All reported issues from iteration_161.json have been FIXED in the code. Icon mappings are correctly implemented, pattern status position is correct in JSX order, rest timer logic counts up properly, and navigation paths are properly configured for client Birth Plan and Message actions.

contraction_timer.issue: Timer icon was a circle instead of stopwatch
contraction_timer.fix_verified: Icon.tsx lines 325-329: timer-outline, stopwatch-outline mapped to 'Timer' (Lucide Timer icon)

contraction_timer.issue: Rest timer not counting up after contraction stops
contraction_timer.fix_verified: contraction-timer.tsx lines 223-234: Rest timer calculates time since last contraction ended and increments via setInterval

contraction_timer.issue: Early Labor message appears too early (before 3 contractions)
contraction_timer.fix_verified: contraction-timer.tsx line 567: getPatternStatusLabel returns 'Timing...' when contractionCount < 3
contraction-timer.tsx lines 851-867: patternStatusCompact renders AFTER bottomActions and secondaryActionsRow
contraction-timer.tsx line 824: End button uses 'flag-outline', Icon.tsx line 333 maps to 'Flag'

contraction_timer.issue: Water Broke button needs water/droplet icon
contraction_timer.fix_verified: contraction-timer.tsx line 833: Water Broke uses 'water', Icon.tsx line 336 maps to 'Droplet'

doula_midwife_navigation.issue: Notes screen back navigation goes to dashboard
doula_midwife_navigation.fix_verified: ProviderNotes.tsx lines 193-197: Breadcrumb uses router.push to client-detail page instead of router.back()

doula_midwife_navigation.issue: See Clients > Message should go to message conversation
doula_midwife_navigation.fix_verified: ProviderClients.tsx lines 431-436: Message button navigates with clientUserId parameter; ProviderMessages.tsx lines 110-122 auto-opens conversation for that client

doula_midwife_navigation.issue: See Clients > Birth Plan should go to client's birth plan
doula_midwife_navigation.fix_verified: ProviderClients.tsx lines 414-415: Birth Plan navigates to /view-birth-plan?momId=X when linked_mom_id exists

code_review.Icon.tsx_mappings: VERIFIED - All icon mappings (timer, stopwatch, flag, water) are correctly defined
code_review.contraction_timer_layout: VERIFIED - Pattern status renders below action buttons in JSX order
code_review.rest_timer_logic: VERIFIED - useEffect correctly calculates and increments rest seconds
code_review.provider_navigation: VERIFIED - All navigation paths correctly configured

api_backend.contraction_session_active: PASS - Returns session with 9 contractions, stats, pattern_status
api_backend.doula_clients: PASS - Returns clients with linked_mom_id populated

test_results.frontend_visual: PARTIAL - Screenshots showed tab bar with Timer icon (looks correct), but full interactive testing was limited by session persistence across navigation in Playwright

critical_code_review_comments: All fixes from iteration_161 have been properly implemented in the code
Icon.tsx has correct Lucide icon mappings for timer, stopwatch, flag, water
Pattern status position is correctly placed after bottomActions and secondaryActionsRow in the JSX
Navigation logic for Birth Plan and Message buttons correctly uses linked_mom_id for direct navigation
Rest timer useEffect properly calculates elapsed time from last contraction end_time
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing demo data sufficient
context_for_next_testing_agent: All icon and navigation fixes verified through code review. Tab bar Timer icon appears correct in screenshot. Backend APIs working (contraction timer, doula clients). Full interactive UI testing was limited by React Native Web + Playwright session handling issues - consider testing with manual browser verification.
rca_of_issues: Previous iteration 161 found missing icon mappings and incorrect pattern status position. Code review confirms all fixes are now in place: (1) Icon mappings added to Icon.tsx (2) Pattern status moved to render after action buttons (3) Rest timer logic properly increments (4) Early Labor threshold set to 3 contractions (5) Navigation uses router.push with proper parameters.
